stages.name: Environment Setup
stages.description: Create repository, install dependencies, clone code
actions: Create project directory structure with src/, data/, configs/, models/, logs/ directories.
Initialize git repository and create .gitignore for Python project.
Install Python dependencies from requirements.txt: torch, torchvision, clip, numpy, scipy, scikit-learn, transformers, Pillow.
Clone the official code repository (if available) into /official_repo/ for reference.
Download pretrained ViT-B/32 CLIP model weights into models/ directory.
Download BLIP model checkpoint into models/blip/ for non-CLIP baseline.

stages.name: Data Preparation
stages.description: Download and preprocess all required datasets
actions: Write src/data/download_coco.sh to download COCO images and ShareGPT4V annotations.
Write src/data/download_flickr30k.py to download Flickr30k images and captions.
Write src/data/download_cifar100.py to download CIFAR-100 dataset.
Write src/data/download_cub200.py to download CUB-200-2011 dataset.
Write src/data/download_flickr8k_expert.py to download Flickr8k-Expert and Flickr8k-CF annotations.
Run python src/preprocess.py --dataset all --split train val test to generate data splits and serialized tensors.
Verify dataset integrity: check image counts and caption lengths.

stages.name: Train Baselines
stages.description: Implement and train all baseline methods for comparison
actions: Write src/models/baselines.py with CLIP baseline model wrapper (original CLIP no modification).
Implement post-hoc embedding shift method MG (λ=0.375, 0.5, -0.5) in src/baselines/mg.py.
Implement CLOOB baseline loss in src/losses/cloob.py.
Implement Unif-Align loss in src/losses/unif_align.py.
Implement PAC-S metric calculation in src/metrics/pac_s.py.
Write config files configs/baseline/clip.yaml, mg_0375.yaml, mg_05.yaml, mg_-05.yaml, cloob.yaml, unif_align.yaml, pac_s.yaml.
Run training scripts: python train_baseline.py --config configs/baseline/<name>.yaml for each baseline requiring training.
Save all baseline model checkpoints and embeddings to outputs/baselines/.

stages.name: Train Proposed Method
stages.description: Implement and train the proposed method
actions: Write src/losses/cyclip.py implementing CyCLIP loss with in-modal and cross-modal cyclic consistency terms.
Create training config configs/cyclip_coco.yaml with lr 1e-6, weight_decay 1e-2, batch_size 128, temperature_log_scale 4.6052, epochs 3.
Run first-stage fine-tuning: python train.py --config configs/cyclip_coco.yaml --model ViT-B/32 --dataset coco_sharegpt4v --output models/lccom.pt
Write src/modules/embedding_shift.py implementing I0T_post standardization: subtract mean and normalize.
Write src/modules/bn_async.py implementing I0T_async setup: add BN layers after frozen encoders.
Implement MCSIE augmentation in src/augmentations/mcsie.py: apply dropout 0.1 to attention layers in ViT/transformer.
Write training script for async BN training: src/train_bn_async.py with MCSIE loss, moving averages alpha=0.1.
Run BN training: python src/train_bn_async.py --config configs/bn_async.yaml --base_model models/lccom.pt --output models/i0t_async.pt

stages.name: Evaluation
stages.description: Run evaluation on all experiments and compute metrics
actions: Write script src/eval/modality_gap.py to compute CD, LS, severity given embeddings.
Write script src/eval/retrieval.py to compute image-to-text and text-to-image Recall@1 on Flickr30k.
Write script src/eval/zeroshot_cls.py to compute top-1 accuracy on CIFAR-100 and CUB-200 using cosine similarity.
Write script src/eval/human_corr.py to compute Kendall's tau correlation with human judgments on Flickr8k-Expert and CF.
Run python src/eval/modality_gap.py --embeddings outputs/*/embeddings.npy to generate modality gap table.
Run python src/eval/retrieval.py --model i0t_async --dataset flickr30k to evaluate retrieval.
Run python src/eval/zeroshot_cls.py --model i0t_async --datasets cifar100 cub200 to evaluate classification.
Run python src/eval/human_corr.py --model i0t_async to evaluate correlation.

stages.name: Final Verification
stages.description: Compare reproduced results against paper claims
actions: Generate summary CSV tables for all metrics from evaluation outputs.
Write script src/verify/compare.py to compare reproduced numbers with paper's Table 1, 2, etc.
Run python src/verify/compare.py --reproduced results/summary.csv --paper paper_results.csv.
Produce verification report listing out-of-tolerance metrics.
Check that I0T_post CD < 0.02 and LS > 0.5.
Check that I0T_async CD < 0.48 and LS > 0.99.
Verify retrieval recall improvements over baselines.
